title: Naseeb
desc: The lives of friends Namdev, Raghu, Damu and Jaggi take a turn for the worse when they win a lottery. Raghu and Damu murder Jaggi and frame Namdev who later returns to seek revenge.

title: Hogi Pyar Ki Jeet
desc: Two brothers attempt to fulfil their dying father's wish by marrying two daughters of an old enemy, intending to exact revenge.

title: Hamara Dil Aapke Paas Hai
desc: When Preeti stands up against a murderer in court, she suffers a devastating consequence. Later, after being rejected by her loved ones, she finds shelter and support in an empathetic stranger.

title: Ajay
desc: Manorama falls in love with Ajay, even though they come from different social backgrounds. They want to get married, but Manorama's uncles try their best to separate the happy couple.

title: Krantiveer
desc: Pratap, a gambler disowned by his family, comes under the care of a landlord named Laxminath. When corrupt forces lead to Laxminath's murder, Pratap seeks revenge.
